JavaScript prototypes and inheritance
JavaScript prototypes and inheritance
JavaScript uses a prototypal inheritance model, which is quite different from the class-based model used by many other languages. In this section, we'll provide a basic overview of how this works, which should give you enough of an understanding to follow our learning materials on
prototype pollution vulnerabilities
